requirement_topic.en: Market Access — SABER Platform: Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) and Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC)
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——SABER平台：产品合格证书（PCoC）与货批合格证书（SCoC）
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——SABER平台：產品合格證書（PCoC）與貨批合格證書（SCoC）

summary.en: Saudi Arabia operates a mandatory market-access conformity assessment framework via the SABER (Saudi Arabia Conformity and Requirements) platform, administered by SASO. For regulated products (those covered by SASO technical regulations), exporters must obtain two certificates through SABER before the goods can be imported and cleared through Saudi customs: (1) a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) — issued by a SASO-approved conformity assessment body following product testing and audit to the applicable technical regulation; and (2) a Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) — issued per consignment by a SASO-approved inspection body, certifying the specific shipment conforms to the approved product. BESS products subject to SASO safety and EMC technical regulations must complete both steps before shipment. The PCoC is product-level and remains valid for a defined period; the SCoC is shipment-specific.
summary.zh: 沙特阿拉伯通过由SASO管理的SABER（沙特合规与要求）平台实施强制性市场准入合格评定框架。对于受SASO技术法规约束的产品，出口商在货物进入沙特海关清关前，须通过SABER取得两份证书：（1）产品合格证书（PCoC）——由SASO认可的合格评定机构依据适用技术法规进行产品测试和审核后颁发；（2）货批合格证书（SCoC）——由SASO认可的检验机构就每批货物颁发，证明该批货物符合已获批准的产品。受SASO安全和EMC技术法规约束的BESS产品，须在发货前完成上述两个步骤。PCoC为产品级，有效期有限；SCoC针对每批货物颁发。
summary.zht: 沙特阿拉伯通過由SASO管理的SABER（沙特合規與要求）平台實施強制性市場准入合格評定框架。對於受SASO技術法規約束的產品，出口商在貨物進入沙特海關清關前，須通過SABER取得兩份證書：（1）產品合格證書（PCoC）——由SASO認可的合格評定機構依據適用技術法規進行產品測試和審核後頒發；（2）貨批合格證書（SCoC）——由SASO認可的檢驗機構就每批貨物頒發，證明該批貨物符合已獲批准的產品。受SASO安全和EMC技術法規約束的BESS產品，須在發貨前完成上述兩個步驟。PCoC為產品級，有效期有限；SCoC針對每批貨物頒發。

standards_or_laws: SABER Platform — saber.sa — mandatory PCoC and SCoC system administered by SASO for regulated products
SASO Resolution / Technical Regulations — applicable technical regulation numbers vary by product category; verify on saber.sa for BESS / electrical energy storage equipment
Saudi Customs Law — customs clearance blocked for regulated products without valid SABER certificates

summary.en: China's equivalent market-access mechanism for exports is primarily the China Compulsory Certification (CCC / 3C) system for regulated products sold domestically, administered by CNCA/SAMR. For exports to third countries, Chinese manufacturers typically rely on voluntary third-party certifications (CQC, CE, CB Scheme, etc.) rather than a government-to-government export approval framework. There is no Chinese export conformity certificate that is accepted by SASO in place of the SABER PCoC/SCoC system. Chinese manufacturers must engage directly with SASO-approved conformity assessment bodies to initiate the SABER process.
summary.zh: 中国对出口产品的市场准入机制主要是针对国内销售受管产品的中国强制认证（CCC/3C）体系，由CNCA/SAMR管理。对于出口第三国，中国制造商通常依赖自愿第三方认证（CQC、CE、CB计划等），而非政府间出口审批框架。目前没有任何中国出口合格证书可被SASO接受以替代SABER PCoC/SCoC体系。中国制造商须直接与SASO认可的合格评定机构联系，启动SABER流程。
summary.zht: 中國對出口產品的市場准入機制主要是針對國內銷售受管產品的中國強制認證（CCC/3C）體系，由CNCA/SAMR管理。對於出口第三國，中國製造商通常依賴自願第三方認證（CQC、CE、CB計畫等），而非政府間出口審批框架。目前沒有任何中國出口合格證書可被SASO接受以替代SABER PCoC/SCoC體系。中國製造商須直接與SASO認可的合格評定機構聯繫，啟動SABER流程。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification / 3C) — CNCA mandatory certification for regulated products sold in China
GB/T 27065-2015 — 合格评定 产品认证机构通用要求 (Conformity Assessment — General Requirements for Product Certification Bodies)

gap.en: Critical process gap: No Chinese export certification, CCC certificate, or third-party voluntary certificate (CE, CB Scheme, CQC) is accepted by SASO as a substitute for the SABER PCoC and SCoC. BESS exporters must: (1) verify that their specific BESS product category is subject to a SASO technical regulation on saber.sa; (2) engage a SASO-approved conformity assessment body (list published by SASO) to obtain the PCoC; (3) arrange SCoC inspection for each shipment with a SASO-approved inspection body. Failure to hold both a valid PCoC and SCoC for each shipment will result in goods being detained or rejected at Saudi customs. Lead time for initial PCoC can be several months if product testing is required from scratch.
gap.zh: 关键流程差距：任何中国出口认证、CCC证书或第三方自愿证书（CE、CB计划、CQC）均不被SASO接受以替代SABER PCoC和SCoC。BESS出口商须：（1）在saber.sa核实其具体BESS产品类别是否受SASO技术法规约束；（2）聘请SASO认可的合格评定机构（SASO公布名单）取得PCoC；（3）为每批货物安排SASO认可检验机构的SCoC检验。若每批货物未持有有效PCoC和SCoC，货物将在沙特海关被扣押或拒绝入境。若产品测试需从头开始，首次PCoC的前置周期可达数月。
gap.zht: 關鍵流程差距：任何中國出口認證、CCC證書或第三方自願證書（CE、CB計畫、CQC）均不被SASO接受以替代SABER PCoC和SCoC。BESS出口商須：（1）在saber.sa核實其具體BESS產品類別是否受SASO技術法規約束；（2）聘請SASO認可的合格評定機構（SASO公布名單）取得PCoC；（3）為每批貨物安排SASO認可檢驗機構的SCoC檢驗。若每批貨物未持有有效PCoC和SCoC，貨物將在沙特海關被扣押或拒絕入境。若產品測試需從頭開始，首次PCoC的前置週期可達數月。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SABER PCoC and SCoC are required for all regulated product imports into Saudi Arabia; customs clearance is blocked without them
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — CCC governs domestic Chinese market; no Chinese export certificate replaces SABER

source.publisher: SASO — Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SABER Platform)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The SABER PCoC and SCoC are mandatory market-access gates for regulated BESS products exported to Saudi Arabia. No Chinese certification substitutes for them. Exporters must register on the SABER platform, verify product category applicability, and engage SASO-approved conformity assessment and inspection bodies well in advance of planned shipment dates to avoid customs delays.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SABER PCoC和SCoC是受管BESS产品出口至沙特阿拉伯的强制性市场准入关口，任何中国认证均不能替代。出口商须在SABER平台注册，核实产品类别适用性，并在计划发货日期前充裕时间内聘请SASO认可的合格评定机构和检验机构，以避免海关延误。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SABER PCoC和SCoC是受管BESS產品出口至沙特阿拉伯的強制性市場准入關口，任何中國認證均不能替代。出口商須在SABER平台註冊，核實產品類別適用性，並在計劃發貨日期前充裕時間內聘請SASO認可的合格評定機構和檢驗機構，以避免海關延誤。

requirement_topic.en: Customs and Import Duties — Saudi Customs Authority / ZATCA
requirement_topic.zh: 海关与进口关税——沙特海关总局 / ZATCA
requirement_topic.zht: 海關與進口關稅——沙特海關總局 / ZATCA

summary.en: Imports of BESS equipment into Saudi Arabia are regulated by the Saudi Customs Authority (Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority — ZATCA). All imports must comply with Saudi customs import procedures including HS code classification, customs valuation, import duty rates under the GCC Common Customs Tariff, and applicable VAT (15% standard rate as of 2020). Electrical energy storage systems may qualify for reduced import duty rates under GCC tariff schedules for renewable energy equipment — importers should verify the applicable HS code and duty rate with a Saudi customs broker. SABER PCoC and SCoC are required by customs for regulated products. Country-of-origin documentation (Certificate of Origin) is required.
summary.zh: 向沙特阿拉伯进口BESS设备受沙特海关总局（税务和海关总局——ZATCA）管辖。所有进口须符合沙特海关进口程序，包括HS编码分类、海关估值、海湾合作委员会共同关税下的进口税率及适用增值税（自2020年起为15%标准税率）。电力储能系统可能符合GCC关税表中可再生能源设备的低税率资格——进口商应向沙特海关经纪人核实适用的HS编码和税率。受管产品的海关清关须提交SABER PCoC和SCoC。同时须提交原产地证明（原产地证书）。
summary.zht: 向沙特阿拉伯進口BESS設備受沙特海關總局（稅務和海關總局——ZATCA）管轄。所有進口須符合沙特海關進口程序，包括HS編碼分類、海關估值、海灣合作委員會共同關稅下的進口稅率及適用增值稅（自2020年起為15%標準稅率）。電力儲能系統可能符合GCC關稅表中可再生能源設備的低稅率資格——進口商應向沙特海關經紀人核實適用的HS編碼和稅率。受管產品的海關清關須提交SABER PCoC和SCoC。同時須提交原產地證明（原產地證書）。

standards_or_laws: GCC Common Customs Tariff — Gulf Cooperation Council common external tariff applied by Saudi Arabia
ZATCA — Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority import regulations and VAT Law (Royal Decree No. M/113)
SABER PCoC / SCoC — required by Saudi customs for regulated product clearance

summary.en: Chinese BESS exports to Saudi Arabia require standard Chinese export customs procedures: HS code classification for export, export customs declaration, and a Certificate of Origin (CO) — typically issued by the China Council for the Promotion of International Trade (CCPIT) or China Customs for Form A (GSP) or standard CO. Under the China-GCC free trade agreement negotiations (ongoing as of mid-2026, not yet in force), there is no preferential tariff arrangement available. Exporters should note that Saudi Arabia applies the GCC common external tariff to Chinese-origin goods.
summary.zh: 中国BESS出口至沙特阿拉伯须完成标准中国出口海关程序：出口商品HS编码分类、出口海关申报及原产地证书（CO）——通常由中国国际贸易促进委员会（CCPIT）或中国海关签发Form A（GSP）或标准CO。中国-海合会自由贸易协定谈判（截至2026年中仍在进行，尚未生效），目前尚无可用的优惠关税安排。出口商应注意，沙特阿拉伯对中国原产商品适用GCC共同对外关税。
summary.zht: 中國BESS出口至沙特阿拉伯須完成標準中國出口海關程序：出口商品HS編碼分類、出口海關申報及原產地證書（CO）——通常由中國國際貿易促進委員會（CCPIT）或中國海關簽發Form A（GSP）或標準CO。中國-海合會自由貿易協定談判（截至2026年中仍在進行，尚未生效），目前尚無可用的優惠關稅安排。出口商應注意，沙特阿拉伯對中國原產商品適用GCC共同對外關稅。

standards_or_laws: CCPIT Certificate of Origin — China Council for the Promotion of International Trade

gap.en: Operational gap: No free trade agreement between China and Saudi Arabia / GCC is in force as of June 2026. Chinese-origin BESS imports are subject to GCC common external tariff rates. Importers should verify the applicable HS code and current duty rate with a Saudi customs broker, as duty rates for energy storage equipment may vary. Arabic-language commercial invoice and packing list may be required by Saudi customs. SABER PCoC and SCoC must accompany each shipment for regulated products.
gap.zh: 操作层面差距：截至2026年6月，中国与沙特阿拉伯/海合会之间尚无生效的自由贸易协定。中国原产BESS进口适用GCC共同对外关税税率。进口商应与沙特海关经纪人核实适用的HS编码和现行税率，因为储能设备的税率可能有所不同。沙特海关可能要求提交阿拉伯语商业发票和装箱单。受管产品的每批货物须随附SABER PCoC和SCoC。
gap.zht: 操作層面差距：截至2026年6月，中國與沙特阿拉伯/海合會之間尚無生效的自由貿易協定。中國原產BESS進口適用GCC共同對外關稅稅率。進口商應與沙特海關經紀人核實適用的HS編碼和現行稅率，因為儲能設備的稅率可能有所不同。沙特海關可能要求提交阿拉伯語商業發票和裝箱單。受管產品的每批貨物須隨附SABER PCoC和SCoC。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ZATCA import procedures, GCC tariff, and SABER certificates all mandatory for import clearance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — standard Chinese export customs procedures required for all exports

source.publisher: ZATCA — Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority (Saudi Arabia)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese BESS exporters must comply with Saudi customs import requirements including correct HS code classification, ZATCA customs declaration, Certificate of Origin, SABER PCoC and SCoC, and applicable GCC tariff and VAT. No China-Saudi free trade agreement is in force as of June 2026. Engage a Saudi-licensed customs broker to confirm current duty rates and documentation requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国BESS出口商须遵守沙特海关进口要求，包括正确的HS编码分类、ZATCA海关申报、原产地证书、SABER PCoC和SCoC，以及适用的GCC关税和增值税。截至2026年6月，中沙自由贸易协定尚未生效。请在发货前聘请沙特持牌海关经纪人确认现行税率和文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國BESS出口商須遵守沙特海關進口要求，包括正確的HS編碼分類、ZATCA海關申報、原產地證書、SABER PCoC和SCoC，以及適用的GCC關稅和增值稅。截至2026年6月，中沙自由貿易協定尚未生效。請在發貨前聘請沙特持牌海關經紀人確認現行稅率和文件要求。
